SELECT bitmapToArray(subBitmap(bitmap_col, toUInt32(0), toUInt32(10)) FROM test_table;
SELECT bitmapToArray(subBitmap(bitmap_col, toUInt32(5), toUInt32(5)) FROM test_table;
SELECT bitmapToArray(subBitmap(bitmap_col, toUInt32(10), toUInt32(20)) FROM test_table;
SELECT bitmapToArray(subBitmap(bitmap_col, toUInt32(30), toUInt32(10)) FROM test_table;
CREATE TABLE another_table (id UInt32, bitmap_data AggregateFunction(bitmapUniq, UInt32));
SELECT t1.id, bitmapToArray(subBitmap(t1.bitmap_data, toUInt32(0), toUInt32(5))) FROM (SELECT bitmap_data FROM another_table) AS t1;
SELECT count(*) FROM (SELECT bitmapToArray(subBitmap(bitmap_data, toUInt32(0), toUInt32(5))) FROM another_table) AS sub_results WHERE length(sub_results) > 0;
SELECT bitmapToArray(subBitmap(bitmap_build([]), toUInt32(0), toUInt32(10))) AS result_empty;
CREATE TABLE complex_table (key UInt32, bitmap_val AggregateFunction(bitmapUnion, UInt32));
INSERT INTO complex_table VALUES (1, bitmapBuild([1,2,3])), (2, bitmapBuild([3,4,5]));
SELECT key, bitmapToArray(subBitmap(bitmap_val, toUInt32(0), toUInt32(4))) FROM complex_table GROUP BY key;
